reviews.review_title: can people play this game please
reviews.review_description: this game is really fun with players but nobody plays. it had a prime  RIP scary ahhhhgame .
I don't know what to do in this game

Even though this is just a stolen project from Stella, I think it's cool what these people are doing. Putting it on AppLab for people can actually play for fun instead of having to do all this other stuff just to play with people! Game is terrifying and really fun with friends! Recommend downloading

reviews.review_title: Please add private codes and more severs
reviews.review_description: There was these people that i joined and they had no mic but they finally talked and told me to join another server and called me a fat freak(i didn't do nothing)

reviews.review_title: Echo makes Stella’s games even better!

reviews.review_description: It’s generally the best sophisticated monkey game and fine gentleman could have happy activities in if you a fine shyt you would love this game but if you’re a chopped shyt you’ll hate it.
The game is fun but there’s bugs, the bodies glitch like crazy causing the game to lag, its kinda annoying dealing with this everytime someone dies.

reviews.review_title: Not the worst, or the best game.
reviews.review_description: The game is okay, I will say it’s a little scary, but gets boring fast, very few maps, and many lag spikes, especially when you get close to a monster, the game is fun for a little bit though.

So this game is stolen from Stella but it’s just an applab version so that people don’t have to go on discord and the apk to your headset. And everyone keeps on saying it’s buggy which is not da monks fault. This project was buggy even when Stella was working on it…But it’s kinda fun to play. It just gets boring fast…
This is nice and scary I really love this game
